title: calicotome villosa var. rigida
intro: Calicotome villosa var. rigida, also known as the spiny broom, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its thorny branches and small white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Calicotome villosa var. rigida include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to treat skin irritations and internal infections.
